LanguageData.Annihilator_Wildfire.label: Annihilator Wildfire
LanguageData.Annihilator_Wildfire.description:
Designation: Annihilator Wildfire Affiliation: Noah Communist League "Iron Curtain" Experimental Weapons Series
Functional Overview:
The Annihilator Wildfire is a high-energy experimental rifle housing a red antiparticle core, co-developed by NCL chief engineer O'Neal and transhuman AI "Justice" amid intense technical controversy. It fires high-frequency oscillating red antiparticle projectiles that trigger localized annihilation reactions upon impact, delivering incalculable destructive damage to single targets and medium clusters.
However, O'Neal never fully endorsed the design. The weapon exhibits extreme recoil instability surpassing human endurance thresholds, while core excitation patterns induce rapid ballistic deviation - transforming each shot into a gamble between skill and fate. Unsuitable for sustained operation and never meeting standard combat unit compatibility requirements.
The Annihilator Wildfire represents a nonlinear destruction vector - the final gamble when conventional tactics and ballistic logic collapse.
Justice audio log #21: "Not flawed design... just excessive passion." "Precision unnecessary - courage sufficient." O'Neal RD annotation: "This shouldn't exist. But existing - never stand before it."
LanguageData.Annihilator_Wildfire.tools.point.label: point
LanguageData.Annihilator_Wildfire.tools.edge.label: edge
LanguageData.Bullet_Annihilator_Wildfire.label: Annihilator_Wildfire_Bullet
